1: import type Database from 'better-sqlite3';
2: 
3: export interface MemoRecordInput {
4:   componentPath: string;
5:   inputFingerprint: string;
6:   codeHash: string;
7:   outputBlob: string;
8:   computedAt?: string;
9: }
10: 
11: export interface MemoRecord extends MemoRecordInput {
12:   computedAt: string;
13: }
14: 
15: export interface DependencyEdgeInput {
16:   parentPath: string;
17:   childPath: string;
18:   kind: string;
19: }
20: 
21: export interface DependencyEdge extends DependencyEdgeInput {
22:   createdAt: string;
23: }
24: 
25: export interface InvalidationResult {
26:   invalidatedPaths: string[];
27:   deletedMemoRecords: number;
28: }
29: 
30: function assertPath(value: string, label: string): void {
31:   if (typeof value !== 'string' || value.trim().length === 0) {
32:     throw new Error(`${label} must be a non-empty string`);
33:   }
34: }
35: 
36: export function ensureMemoStorageSchema(database: Database.Database): void {
37:   database.exec(`
38:     CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS memoization_records (
39:       component_path TEXT NOT NULL,
40:       input_fingerprint TEXT NOT NULL,
41:       code_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
42:       output_blob TEXT NOT NULL,
43:       computed_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
44:       PRIMARY KEY (component_path, input_fingerprint, code_hash)
45:     );
46: 
47:     CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dependency_edges (
48:       parent_path TEXT NOT NULL,
49:       child_path TEXT NOT NULL,
50:       kind TEXT NOT NULL,
51:       created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
52:       PRIMARY KEY (parent_path, child_path, kind),
53:       CHECK(parent_path != child_path)
54:     );
55: 
56:     CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_memoization_records_component
57:       ON memoization_records(component_path);
58:     CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_dependency_edges_parent
59:       ON dependency_edges(parent_path);
60:     CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_dependency_edges_child
61:       ON dependency_edges(child_path);
62:     CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_dependency_edges_kind
63:       ON dependency_edges(kind);
64:   `);
65: }
66: 
67: function mapMemoRow(row: {
68:   component_path: string;
69:   input_fingerprint: string;
70:   code_hash: string;
71:   output_blob: string;
72:   computed_at: string;
73: }): MemoRecord {
74:   return {
75:     componentPath: row.component_path,
76:     inputFingerprint: row.input_fingerprint,
77:     codeHash: row.code_hash,
78:     outputBlob: row.output_blob,
79:     computedAt: row.computed_at,
80:   };
81: }
82: 
83: function mapEdgeRow(row: {
84:   parent_path: string;
85:   child_path: string;
86:   kind: string;
87:   created_at: string;
88: }): DependencyEdge {
89:   return {
90:     parentPath: row.parent_path,
91:     childPath: row.child_path,
92:     kind: row.kind,
93:     createdAt: row.created_at,
94:   };
95: }
96: 
97: export class MemoStore {
98:   constructor(private readonly database: Database.Database) {
99:     ensureMemoStorageSchema(database);
100:   }
101: 
102:   getMemoRecord(componentPath: string, inputFingerprint: string, codeHash: string): MemoRecord | null {
103:     const row = this.database.prepare(`
104:       SELECT component_path, input_fingerprint, code_hash, output_blob, computed_at
105:       FROM memoization_records
106:       WHERE component_path = ?
107:         AND input_fingerprint = ?
108:         AND code_hash = ?
109:       LIMIT 1
110:     `).get(componentPath, inputFingerprint, codeHash) as Parameters<typeof mapMemoRow>[0] | undefined;
111: 
112:     return row ? mapMemoRow(row) : null;
113:   }
114: 
115:   upsertMemoRecord(record: MemoRecordInput): void {
116:     assertPath(record.componentPath, 'componentPath');
117:     assertPath(record.inputFingerprint, 'inputFingerprint');
118:     assertPath(record.codeHash, 'codeHash');
119:     this.database.prepare(`
120:       INSERT INTO memoization_records (
121:         component_path,
122:         input_fingerprint,
123:         code_hash,
124:         output_blob,
125:         computed_at
126:       ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, COALESCE(?, datetime('now')))
127:       ON CONFLICT(component_path, input_fingerprint, code_hash) DO UPDATE SET
128:         output_blob = excluded.output_blob,
129:         computed_at = excluded.computed_at
130:     `).run(
131:       record.componentPath,
132:       record.inputFingerprint,
133:       record.codeHash,
134:       record.outputBlob,
135:       record.computedAt ?? null,
136:     );
137:   }
138: 
139:   deleteMemoRecords(componentPaths: readonly string[]): number {
140:     const paths = Array.from(new Set(componentPaths.filter((value) => typeof value === 'string' && value.length > 0)));
141:     if (paths.length === 0) {
142:       return 0;
143:     }
144: 
145:     const placeholders = paths.map(() => '?').join(', ');
146:     const result = this.database.prepare(`
147:       DELETE FROM memoization_records
148:       WHERE component_path IN (${placeholders})
149:     `).run(...paths) as { changes: number };
150:     return result.changes;
151:   }
152: 
153:   listDependencyEdges(parentPath?: string): DependencyEdge[] {
154:     const rows = parentPath
155:       ? this.database.prepare(`
156:           SELECT parent_path, child_path, kind, created_at
157:           FROM dependency_edges
158:           WHERE parent_path = ?
159:           ORDER BY parent_path, child_path, kind
160:         `).all(parentPath) as Parameters<typeof mapEdgeRow>[0][]
161:       : this.database.prepare(`
162:           SELECT parent_path, child_path, kind, created_at
163:           FROM dependency_edges
164:           ORDER BY parent_path, child_path, kind
165:         `).all() as Parameters<typeof mapEdgeRow>[0][];
166: 
167:     return rows.map(mapEdgeRow);
168:   }
169: 
170:   addDependencyEdge(edge: DependencyEdgeInput): void {
171:     assertPath(edge.parentPath, 'parentPath');
172:     assertPath(edge.childPath, 'childPath');
173:     assertPath(edge.kind, 'kind');
174:     if (this.wouldCreateCycle(edge.parentPath, edge.childPath)) {
175:       throw new Error(`Dependency edge would create a cycle: ${edge.parentPath} -> ${edge.childPath}`);
176:     }
177: 
178:     this.database.prepare(`
179:       INSERT OR IGNORE INTO dependency_edges (parent_path, child_path, kind)
180:       VALUES (?, ?, ?)
181:     `).run(edge.parentPath, edge.childPath, edge.kind);
182:   }
183: 
184:   collectDependents(parentPaths: readonly string[]): string[] {
185:     const roots = Array.from(new Set(parentPaths.filter((value) => typeof value === 'string' && value.length > 0)));
186:     if (roots.length === 0) {
187:       return [];
188:     }
189: 
190:     const placeholders = roots.map(() => '?').join(', ');
191:     const rows = this.database.prepare(`
192:       WITH RECURSIVE dependents(child_path) AS (
193:         SELECT child_path
194:         FROM dependency_edges
195:         WHERE parent_path IN (${placeholders})
196:         UNION
197:         SELECT edge.child_path
198:         FROM dependency_edges edge
199:         JOIN dependents dep ON edge.parent_path = dep.child_path
200:       )
201:       SELECT DISTINCT child_path
202:       FROM dependents
203:       ORDER BY child_path
204:     `).all(...roots) as Array<{ child_path: string }>;
205: 
206:     return rows.map((row) => row.child_path);
207:   }
208: 
209:   invalidateDependents(parentPaths: readonly string[], includeSources = false): InvalidationResult {
210:     const roots = Array.from(new Set(parentPaths.filter((value) => typeof value === 'string' && value.length > 0)));
211:     const invalidatedPaths = this.collectDependents(roots);
212:     const deleteTargets = includeSources ? Array.from(new Set([...roots, ...invalidatedPaths])) : invalidatedPaths;
213:     const deletedMemoRecords = this.deleteMemoRecords(deleteTargets);
214:     return { invalidatedPaths, deletedMemoRecords };
215:   }
216: 
217:   private wouldCreateCycle(parentPath: string, childPath: string): boolean {
218:     if (parentPath === childPath) {
219:       return true;
220:     }
221: 
222:     return this.collectDependents([childPath]).includes(parentPath);
223:   }
224: }
225: 
226: export function createMemoStore(database: Database.Database): MemoStore {
227:   return new MemoStore(database);
228: }

(End of file - total 228 lines)
</content>

<content>
1: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2: // MODULE: Code Graph Recovery Procedures
3: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
4: // Typed implementations of CG-RP-001, CG-RP-002, and CG-RP-003.
5: 
6: import Database from 'better-sqlite3';
7: import {
8:   copyFileSync,
9:   existsSync,
10:   mkdirSync,
11:   readdirSync,
12:   renameSync,
13:   rmSync,
14: } from 'node:fs';
15: import { basename, join, relative, resolve, sep } from 'node:path';
16: import { DATABASE_DIR } from '../core/config.js';
17: import { closeDb } from './code-graph-db.js';
18: 
19: export type ScanFunction = (args: { incremental: boolean }) => Promise<unknown>;
20: 
21: export interface RecoveryProcedureOptions {
22:   dbDir?: string;
23:   auditDir?: string;
24:   now?: () => Date;
25:   scan?: ScanFunction;
26: }
27: 
28: export interface RecoveryProcedureResult {
29:   procedureId: 'CG-RP-001' | 'CG-RP-002' | 'CG-RP-003';
30:   status: 'ok' | 'failed';
31:   quarantineDir?: string;
32:   recoveryDir?: string;
33:   knownGoodDir?: string;
34:   restored?: boolean;
35:   scanIncremental?: boolean;
36:   integrityCheck?: string;
37:   stagedFiles?: string[];
38:   errors: string[];
39: }
40: 
41: const DB_TRIPLET = [
42:   'code-graph.sqlite',
43:   'code-graph.sqlite-wal',
44:   'code-graph.sqlite-shm',
45: ] as const;
46: 
47: function timestamp(now: () => Date): string {
48:   return now().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-');
49: }
50: 
51: function ensureDir(path: string): string {
52:   mkdirSync(path, { recursive: true, mode: 0o700 });
53:   return path;
54: }
55: 
56: function assertInside(parent: string, child: string): void {
57:   const parentResolved = resolve(parent);
58:   const childResolved = resolve(child);
59:   const parentWithSep = parentResolved.endsWith(sep) ? parentResolved : `${parentResolved}${sep}`;
60:   if (childResolved !== parentResolved && !childResolved.startsWith(parentWithSep)) {
61:     throw new Error(`Path escapes recovery root: ${child}`);
62:   }
63: }
64: 
65: function resolveDbDir(dbDir?: string): string {
66:   const resolved = resolve(dbDir ?? DATABASE_DIR);
67:   ensureDir(resolved);
68:   return resolved;
69: }
70: 
71: function tripletPath(dbDir: string, fileName: typeof DB_TRIPLET[number]): string {
72:   const path = join(dbDir, fileName);
73:   if (basename(path) !== fileName) {
74:     throw new Error(`Invalid DB triplet file name: ${fileName}`);
75:   }
76:   assertInside(dbDir, path);
77:   return path;
78: }
79: 
80: function copyTriplet(dbDir: string, targetDir: string): number {
81:   ensureDir(targetDir);
82:   assertInside(resolve(targetDir, '..'), targetDir);
83:   let copied = 0;
84:   for (const fileName of DB_TRIPLET) {
85:     const source = tripletPath(dbDir, fileName);
86:     if (!existsSync(source)) {
87:       continue;
88:     }
89:     copyFileSync(source, join(targetDir, fileName));
90:     copied += 1;
91:   }
92:   return copied;
93: }
94: 
95: function moveTriplet(dbDir: string, targetDir: string): number {
96:   ensureDir(targetDir);
97:   let moved = 0;
98:   for (const fileName of DB_TRIPLET) {
99:     const source = tripletPath(dbDir, fileName);
100:     if (!existsSync(source)) {
101:       continue;
102:     }
103:     renameSync(source, join(targetDir, fileName));
104:     moved += 1;
105:   }
106:   return moved;
107: }
108: 
109: function restoreTriplet(sourceDir: string, dbDir: string): number {
110:   let restored = 0;
111:   for (const fileName of DB_TRIPLET) {
112:     const source = join(sourceDir, fileName);
113:     if (!existsSync(source)) {
114:       continue;
115:     }
116:     copyFileSync(source, tripletPath(dbDir, fileName));
117:     restored += 1;
118:   }
119:   return restored;
120: }
121: 
122: function runIntegrityCheck(sqlitePath: string): string {
123:   if (!existsSync(sqlitePath)) {
124:     return 'missing';
125:   }
126:   const db = new Database(sqlitePath, { readonly: true, fileMustExist: true });
127:   try {
128:     const rows = db.pragma('integrity_check') as Array<Record<string, unknown>>;
129:     return rows.map((row) => String(Object.values(row)[0] ?? '')).join('\n') || 'ok';
130:   } finally {
131:     db.close();
132:   }
133: }
134: 
135: function findLatestKnownGood(dbDir: string, auditDir: string): string | null {
136:   const roots = [auditDir, dbDir];
137:   const candidates: string[] = [];
138:   for (const root of roots) {
139:     if (!existsSync(root)) {
140:       continue;
141:     }
142:     for (const entry of readdirSync(root, { withFileTypes: true })) {
143:       if (entry.isDirectory() && entry.name.startsWith('known-good-')) {
144:         candidates.push(join(root, entry.name));
145:       }
146:     }
147:   }
148:   return candidates.sort().at(-1) ?? null;
149: }
150: 
151: export function snapshotKnownGoodTriplet(options: RecoveryProcedureOptions = {}): string {
152:   const dbDir = resolveDbDir(options.dbDir);
153:   const auditDir = ensureDir(resolve(options.auditDir ?? join(dbDir, 'apply-audit')));
154:   assertInside(dbDir, auditDir);
155:   const knownGoodDir = join(auditDir, `known-good-${timestamp(options.now ?? (() => new Date()))}`);
156:   copyTriplet(dbDir, knownGoodDir);
157:   return knownGoodDir;
158: }
159: 
160: export async function recoverSqliteCorruption(
161:   options: RecoveryProcedureOptions = {},
162: ): Promise<RecoveryProcedureResult> {
163:   const dbDir = resolveDbDir(options.dbDir);
164:   const ts = timestamp(options.now ?? (() => new Date()));
165:   const recoveryDir = join(dbDir, `recovery-${ts}`);
166:   const quarantineDir = join(dbDir, `quarantine-${ts}`);
167:   const errors: string[] = [];
168:   let integrityCheck = 'missing';
169: 
170:   try {
171:     closeDb();
172:     copyTriplet(dbDir, recoveryDir);
173:     integrityCheck = runIntegrityCheck(join(recoveryDir, 'code-graph.sqlite'));
174:     moveTriplet(dbDir, quarantineDir);
175:     if (options.scan) {
176:       await options.scan({ incremental: false });
177:     }
178:     return {
179:       procedureId: 'CG-RP-001',
180:       status: 'ok',
181:       recoveryDir,
182:       quarantineDir,
183:       integrityCheck,
184:       scanIncremental: false,
185:       errors,
186:     };
187:   } catch (error) {
188:     errors.push(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
189:     return {
190:       procedureId: 'CG-RP-001',
191:       status: 'failed',
192:       recoveryDir,
193:       quarantineDir,
194:       integrityCheck,
195:       errors,
196:     };
197:   }
198: }
199: 
200: export async function recoverPartialScanFailure(
201:   options: RecoveryProcedureOptions & {
202:     staleFileCount?: number;
203:     gitHeadDrift?: boolean;
204:     schemaOrErrorSignal?: boolean;
205:   } = {},
206: ): Promise<RecoveryProcedureResult> {
207:   const dbDir = resolveDbDir(options.dbDir);
208:   const errors: string[] = [];
209:   const sqlitePath = tripletPath(dbDir, 'code-graph.sqlite');
210:   let integrityCheck = 'missing';
211:   let stagedFiles: string[] = [];
212: 
213:   try {
214:     integrityCheck = runIntegrityCheck(sqlitePath);
215:     if (existsSync(sqlitePath)) {
216:       const db = new Database(sqlitePath, { readonly: true, fileMustExist: true });
217:       try {
218:         const rows = db.prepare('SELECT file_path FROM code_files WHERE file_mtime_ms = 0 ORDER BY file_path LIMIT 50').all() as Array<{ file_path: string }>;
219:         stagedFiles = rows.map((row) => row.file_path);
220:       } finally {
221:         db.close();
222:       }
223:     }
224:     const staleFileCount = options.staleFileCount ?? stagedFiles.length;
225:     const incremental = staleFileCount <= 50 && options.gitHeadDrift !== true && options.schemaOrErrorSignal !== true;
226:     if (options.scan) {
227:       await options.scan({ incremental });
228:     }
229:     return {
230:       procedureId: 'CG-RP-002',
231:       status: 'ok',
232:       integrityCheck,
233:       stagedFiles,
234:       scanIncremental: incremental,
235:       errors,
236:     };
237:   } catch (error) {
238:     errors.push(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
239:     return {
240:       procedureId: 'CG-RP-002',
241:       status: 'failed',
242:       integrityCheck,
243:       stagedFiles,
244:       errors,
245:     };
246:   }
247: }

249: export async function rollbackBadApply(
250:   options: RecoveryProcedureOptions = {},
251: ): Promise<RecoveryProcedureResult> {
252:   const dbDir = resolveDbDir(options.dbDir);
253:   const auditDir = ensureDir(resolve(options.auditDir ?? join(dbDir, 'apply-audit')));
254:   assertInside(dbDir, auditDir);
255:   const ts = timestamp(options.now ?? (() => new Date()));
256:   const quarantineDir = join(auditDir, `bad-apply-${ts}`);
257:   const errors: string[] = [];
258:   let knownGoodDir: string | null = null;
259:   let restored = false;
260: 
261:   try {
262:     closeDb();
263:     moveTriplet(dbDir, quarantineDir);
264:     knownGoodDir = findLatestKnownGood(dbDir, auditDir);
265:     if (knownGoodDir) {
266:       assertInside(dbDir, knownGoodDir);
267:       restored = restoreTriplet(knownGoodDir, dbDir) > 0;
268:     }
269:     if (restored && existsSync(tripletPath(dbDir, 'code-graph.sqlite'))) {
270:       const db = new Database(tripletPath(dbDir, 'code-graph.sqlite'));
271:       try {
272:         db.pragma('wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE)');
273:       } finally {
274:         db.close();
275:       }
276:     }
277:     if (options.scan) {
278:       await options.scan({ incremental: false });
279:     }
280:     return {
281:       procedureId: 'CG-RP-003',
282:       status: 'ok',
283:       quarantineDir,
284:       ...(knownGoodDir ? { knownGoodDir } : {}),
285:       restored,
286:       scanIncremental: false,
287:       errors,
288:     };
289:   } catch (error) {
290:     errors.push(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
291:     try {
292:       if (existsSync(quarantineDir) && readdirSync(quarantineDir).length === 0) {
293:         rmSync(quarantineDir, { recursive: true, force: true });
294:       }
295:     } catch {
296:       // Cleanup failure is not more important than the recovery failure.
297:     }
298:     return {
299:       procedureId: 'CG-RP-003',
300:       status: 'failed',
301:       quarantineDir,
302:       ...(knownGoodDir ? { knownGoodDir } : {}),
303:       restored,
304:       errors,
305:     };
306:   }
307: }

309: export function relativizeRecoveryPath(path: string, root: string = process.cwd()): string {
310:   const rel = relative(root, path);
311:   return rel.startsWith('..') ? path : rel;
312: }

1853: function restoreGenericTable(
1854:   database: Database.Database,
1855:   tableName: string,
1856:   tableSnapshot: TableSnapshot,
1857: ): number {
1858:   if (!tableExists(database, tableName)) {
1859:     return 0;
1860:   }
1861: 
1862:   const columns = tableSnapshot.columns.length > 0
1863:     ? tableSnapshot.columns
1864:     : Object.keys(tableSnapshot.rows[0] ?? {});
1865:   if (columns.length === 0 || tableSnapshot.rows.length === 0) {
1866:     return 0;
1867:   }
1868: 
1869:   const placeholders = columns.map(() => '?').join(', ');
1870:   const insertVerb = tableName === 'vec_memories' ? 'INSERT' : 'INSERT OR REPLACE';
1871:   const insertStmt = database.prepare(`
1872:     ${insertVerb} INTO ${tableName} (${columns.join(', ')})
1873:     VALUES (${placeholders})
1874:   `) as Database.Statement;
1875:   const deleteVecById = tableName === 'vec_memories'
1876:     ? database.prepare('DELETE FROM vec_memories WHERE rowid = ?') as Database.Statement
1877:     : null;
1878: 
1879:   let restored = 0;
1880:   for (const row of tableSnapshot.rows) {
1881:     const values = columns.map((column) => deserializeSnapshotValue(row[column]));
1882:     if (deleteVecById) {
1883:       deleteVecById.run(row.rowid);
1884:     }
1885:     insertStmt.run(...values);
1886:     restored++;
1887:   }
1888:   return restored;

1895: function runDerivedArtifactRebuilds(
1896:   database: Database.Database,

1946:   const skipped: DerivedRebuildSkipped[] = [];
1947: 
1948:   for (const { name, deps, run } of rebuildSteps) {
1949:     const missingDeps = deps.filter((dependency) => !completed.has(dependency));
1950:     if (missingDeps.length > 0) {
1951:       const reason = `dependencies did not complete: ${missingDeps.join(', ')}`;
1952:       skipped.push({ name, reason });
1953:       console.warn(

1966:     }

1968: 
1969:   const summary: DerivedRebuildSummary = {
1970:     completed: [...completed],
1971:     failed,
1972:     skipped,
1973:   };
1974: 
1975:   console.warn(
1976:     `[checkpoints] ${logContext} rebuild summary: completed=${summary.completed.join(', ') || 'none'}; failed=${summary.failed.map((entry) => entry.name).join(', ') || 'none'}; skipped=${summary.skipped.map((entry) => entry.name).join(', ') || 'none'}`,

2044: function normalizeMemoryColumnValue(column: string, value: unknown): unknown {
2045:   if (value === undefined) {
2046:     if (column === 'confidence') return 0.5;
2047:     if (column === 'stability') return 1.0;
2048:     if (column === 'difficulty') return 5.0;
2049:     if (column === 'review_count') return 0;
2050:     return null;

2052: 
2053:   if (column === 'confidence') {
2054:     return Number.isFinite(value) ? value : 0.5;
2055:   }
2056:   if (column === 'stability') {
2057:     return Number.isFinite(value) ? value : 1.0;
2058:   }
2059:   if (column === 'difficulty') {
2060:     return Number.isFinite(value) ? value : 5.0;
2061:   }
2062:   if (column === 'review_count') {
2063:     return Number.isFinite(value) ? value : 0;
2064:   }
2065: 
2066:   if ((column === 'trigger_phrases' || column === 'quality_flags') && Array.isArray(value)) {
2067:     return JSON.stringify(value);
2068:   }
2069: 
2070:   return value;
2071: }

2073: function getMemoryRestoreColumns(
2074:   database: Database.Database,
2075:   memories: Array<Record<string, unknown>>
2076: ): string[] {
2077:   const tableColumns = new Set(getTableColumns(database, 'memory_index'));
2078:   if (tableColumns.size === 0) {
2079:     return [];
2080:   }
2081: 
2082:   const snapshotColumns = new Set<string>();
2083:   for (const memory of memories) {
2084:     for (const key of Object.keys(memory)) {
2085:       if (tableColumns.has(key)) {
2086:         snapshotColumns.add(key);
2087:       }
2088:     }
2089:   }
2090: 
2091:   const preferredOrder = [
2092:     'id',
2093:     'spec_folder',
2094:     'file_path',
2095:     'canonical_file_path',
2096:     'anchor_id',
2097:     'title',
2098:     'trigger_phrases',
2099:     'importance_weight',
2100:     'created_at',
2101:     'updated_at',
2102:     'embedding_model',
2103:     'embedding_generated_at',
2104:     'embedding_status',
2105:     'retry_count',
2106:     'last_retry_at',
2107:     'failure_reason',
2108:     'base_importance',
2109:     'decay_half_life_days',
2110:     'is_pinned',
2111:     'access_count',
2112:     'last_accessed',
2113:     'importance_tier',
2114:     'session_id',
2115:     'context_type',
2116:     'channel',
2117:     'content_hash',
2118:     'expires_at',
2119:     'confidence',
2120:     'validation_count',
2121:     'stability',
2122:     'difficulty',
2123:     'last_review',
2124:     'review_count',
2125:     'file_mtime_ms',
2126:     'is_archived', // DEPRECATED schema compatibility
2127:     'document_type',
2128:     'spec_level',
2129:     'content_text',
2130:     'quality_score',
2131:     'quality_flags',
2132:     'parent_id',
2133:     'chunk_index',
2134:     'chunk_label',
2135:   ];
2136: 
2137:   const ordered = preferredOrder.filter((column) => snapshotColumns.has(column));
2138:   const extras = Array.from(snapshotColumns)
2139:     .filter((column) => !ordered.includes(column))
2140:     .sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b));
2141: 
2142:   return [...ordered, ...extras];
2143: }

2145: /* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2146:    6. Fix: CHECKPOINT SCHEMA VALIDATION
2147:    Validate each memory row before restore to prevent silent data
2148:    loss from corrupt/malformed checkpoint snapshots.

2150: 
2151: /**
2152:  * Validates a single memory row from a checkpoint snapshot.
2153:  * Throws on invalid data — caller should reject the entire restore.
2154:  *
2155:  * Strict on identity fields (id, file_path, spec_folder).
2156:  * Required-but-lenient on INSERT-needed fields (must be present, type flexible).
2157:  * Optional fields (anchor_id, embedding_*, etc.) may be null/undefined for
2158:  * backwards compatibility with older checkpoint formats.
2159:  */
2160: function validateMemoryRow(
2161:   row: unknown,
2162:   index: number,
2163:   governanceAudits: GovernanceAuditEntry[] = [],
2164:   tierDowngradeAudits: TierDowngradeAuditParams[] = [],
2165: ): void {
2166:   if (!row || typeof row !== 'object') {
2167:     throw new Error(`Checkpoint row ${index}: not an object (got ${typeof row})`);
2168:   }
2169:   const r = row as Record<string, unknown>;
2170: 
2171:   // --- Strict identity fields (core to INSERT and data integrity) ---
2172:   if (typeof r.id !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(r.id)) {
2173:     throw new Error(`Checkpoint row ${index}: id must be a finite number, got ${typeof r.id} (${String(r.id)})`);
2174:   }
2175:   if (typeof r.file_path !== 'string' || !r.file_path) {
2176:     throw new Error(`Checkpoint row ${index}: file_path must be non-empty string, got ${typeof r.file_path}`);
2177:   }
2178:   if (typeof r.spec_folder !== 'string' || !r.spec_folder) {
2179:     throw new Error(`Checkpoint row ${index}: spec_folder must be non-empty string, got ${typeof r.spec_folder}`);
2180:   }
2181: 
2182:   // --- Required fields for INSERT (must be present; type flexibility for compat) ---
2183:   const requiredFields = ['title', 'importance_weight', 'created_at', 'updated_at', 'importance_tier'];
2184:   for (const field of requiredFields) {
2185:     if (r[field] === undefined) {
2186:       throw new Error(`Checkpoint row ${index}: missing required field '${field}'`);
2187:     }
2188:   }
2189: 
2190:   const resolvedPath = typeof r.canonical_file_path === 'string' && r.canonical_file_path.length > 0
2191:     ? r.canonical_file_path
2192:     : r.file_path;
2193: 
2194:   if (!shouldIndexForMemory(resolvedPath as string)) {
2195:     governanceAudits.push({
2196:       action: GOVERNANCE_AUDIT_ACTIONS.CHECKPOINT_RESTORE_EXCLUDED_PATH_REJECTED,
2197:       decision: 'deny',
2198:       memoryId: r.id as number,
2199:       logicalKey: buildGovernanceLogicalKey(
2200:         typeof r.spec_folder === 'string' ? r.spec_folder : null,
2201:         resolvedPath as string,
2202:         typeof r.anchor_id === 'string' ? r.anchor_id : null,
2203:       ),
2204:       reason: 'checkpoint_restore_path_excluded',
2205:       metadata: {
2206:         source: 'checkpoint_restore',
2207:         rowIndex: index,
2208:         filePath: r.file_path,
2209:         canonicalFilePath: typeof r.canonical_file_path === 'string' ? r.canonical_file_path : null,
2210:         importanceTier: r.importance_tier ?? null,
2211:       },
2212:     });
2213:     throw new Error(`Checkpoint row ${index}: path excluded from memory indexing (${resolvedPath as string})`);
2214:   }
2215: 
2216:   if (r.importance_tier === 'constitutional' && !isIndexableConstitutionalMemoryPath(resolvedPath as string)) {
2217:     tierDowngradeAudits.push({
2218:       memoryId: r.id as number,
2219:       logicalKey: buildGovernanceLogicalKey(
2220:         typeof r.spec_folder === 'string' ? r.spec_folder : null,
2221:         resolvedPath as string,
2222:         typeof r.anchor_id === 'string' ? r.anchor_id : null,
2223:       ),
2224:       action: GOVERNANCE_AUDIT_ACTIONS.TIER_DOWNGRADE_NON_CONSTITUTIONAL_PATH,
2225:       reason: 'non_constitutional_path',
2226:       requestedTier: 'constitutional',
2227:       nextTier: 'important',
2228:       source: 'checkpoint_restore',
2229:       filePath: typeof r.file_path === 'string' ? r.file_path : null,
2230:       canonicalFilePath: typeof r.canonical_file_path === 'string' ? r.canonical_file_path : null,
2231:       metadata: {
2232:         rowIndex: index,
2233:         importanceTier: r.importance_tier ?? null,
2234:       },
2235:     });

2241:    7. CHECKPOINT OPERATIONS
2242: ----------------------------------------------------------------*/
2243: 
2244: function createCheckpointV2(
2245:   database: Database.Database,
2246:   options: Required<Pick<CreateCheckpointOptions, 'name' | 'includeEmbeddings' | 'metadata'>>,
2247: ): CheckpointInfo {
2248:   const sanitizedName = sanitizeCheckpointName(options.name);
2249:   const finalDir = resolveCheckpointDir(database, sanitizedName);
2250:   const checkpointsDir = path.dirname(finalDir);
2251:   const tmpDir = `${finalDir}.tmp-${process.pid}`;
2252:   const mainSnapshotPath = path.join(tmpDir, 'snapshot-main.sqlite');
2253:   const vecSnapshotPath = path.join(tmpDir, 'snapshot-vec.sqlite');
2254:   let published = false;
2255: 
2256:   try {
2257:     const existing = database.prepare('SELECT id FROM checkpoints WHERE name = ?').get(sanitizedName) as { id?: number } | undefined;
2258:     if (existing?.id) {
2259:       throw new CheckpointCreateError(
2260:         'CHECKPOINT_CREATE_DUPLICATE_NAME',
2261:         'Checkpoint creation failed because a checkpoint with this name already exists.',
2262:         { name: sanitizedName },
2263:       );
2264:     }
2265: 
2266:     try {
2267:       database.pragma('busy_timeout = 5000');
2268:     } catch (_pragmaError: unknown) {
2269:       // Non-fatal: older/mocked better-sqlite3 handles may not expose pragma.
2270:     }
2271: 
2272:     fs.mkdirSync(checkpointsDir, { recursive: true, mode: 0o700 });
2273:     sweepStaleCheckpointTmpDirs(checkpointsDir);
2274:     sweepOrphanCheckpointSnapshotDirs(database, checkpointsDir);
2275:     fs.rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true });
2276:     fs.mkdirSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, mode: 0o700 });
2277: 
2278:     let lastVacuumError: unknown;
2279:     for (let attempt = 1; attempt <= CHECKPOINT_CREATE_MAX_ATTEMPTS; attempt += 1) {
2280:       try {
2281:         database.exec(`VACUUM main INTO ${quoteSqlString(mainSnapshotPath)}`);
2282:         const activeVecPath = getActiveVectorShardPath(database);
2283:         if (options.includeEmbeddings && activeVecPath) {
2284:           database.exec(`VACUUM active_vec INTO ${quoteSqlString(vecSnapshotPath)}`);
2285:         }
2286:         break;
2287:       } catch (error: unknown) {
2288:         lastVacuumError = error;
2289:         if (!isCheckpointBusyError(error) || attempt >= CHECKPOINT_CREATE_MAX_ATTEMPTS) {
2290:           throw error;
2291:         }
2292:         fs.rmSync(mainSnapshotPath, { force: true });
2293:         fs.rmSync(vecSnapshotPath, { force: true });
2294:         const delayMs = checkpointRetryDelayMs();
2295:         console.warn(
2296:           `[checkpoints] createCheckpoint v2 VACUUM busy for "${sanitizedName}" on attempt ${attempt}; retrying in ${delayMs}ms`,
2297:         );
2298:         sleepSync(delayMs);
2299:       }
2300:     }
2301: 
2302:     if (lastVacuumError && !fs.existsSync(mainSnapshotPath)) {
2303:       throw lastVacuumError;
2304:     }
2305: 
2306:     const createdAt = new Date().toISOString();
2307:     const gitBranch = getGitBranch();
2308:     const activeVecPath = getActiveVectorShardPath(database);
2309:     const vecIncluded = options.includeEmbeddings && !!activeVecPath && fs.existsSync(vecSnapshotPath);
2310:     const mainBytes = fs.statSync(mainSnapshotPath).size;
2311:     const vecBytes = vecIncluded ? fs.statSync(vecSnapshotPath).size : 0;
2312:     const manifest: CheckpointV2Manifest = {
2313:       formatVersion: 2,
2314:       createdAt,
2315:       specFolder: null,
2316:       gitBranch,
2317:       embedderSlug: deriveEmbedderSlug(activeVecPath),
2318:       includeEmbeddings: options.includeEmbeddings,
2319:       mainTables: CHECKPOINT_MANIFEST.snapshot.filter((tableName) => tableName !== 'vec_memories' && tableName !== 'vec_metadata'),
2320:       vecTables: vecIncluded ? ['vec_memories', 'vec_metadata'] : [],
2321:       schemaVersion: readSchemaVersion(database) ?? SCHEMA_VERSION,
2322:       memoryCount: countTableRows(database, 'memory_index'),
2323:       vectorCount: vecIncluded ? countActiveVectorRows(database) : 0,
2324:       mainBytes,
2325:       vecBytes,
2326:     };
2327:     fs.writeFileSync(path.join(tmpDir, 'manifest.json'), `${JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2)}\n`, { mode: 0o600 });
2328:     fs.renameSync(tmpDir, finalDir);
2329:     published = true;
2330: 
2331:     let prunedSnapshotPaths: string[] = [];
2332:     const checkpointMetadata = {
2333:       ...options.metadata,
2334:       formatVersion: 2,
2335:       memoryCount: manifest.memoryCount,
2336:       vectorCount: manifest.vectorCount,
2337:       includeEmbeddings: options.includeEmbeddings,
2338:       manifest,
2339:     };
2340: 
2341:     const checkpointInfo = database.transaction(() => {
2342:       const result = (database.prepare(`
2343:         INSERT INTO checkpoints (name, created_at, spec_folder, git_branch, memory_snapshot, snapshot_format, snapshot_path, metadata)
2344:         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
2345:       `) as Database.Statement).run(
2346:         sanitizedName,
2347:         createdAt,
2348:         null,
2349:         gitBranch,
2350:         null,
2351:         'v2',
2352:         finalDir,
2353:         JSON.stringify(checkpointMetadata),
2354:       );
2355: 
2356:       prunedSnapshotPaths = enforceMaxCheckpointsInTransaction(database);
2357: 
2358:       return {
2359:         id: (result as { lastInsertRowid: number | bigint }).lastInsertRowid as number,
2360:         name: sanitizedName,
2361:         createdAt,
2362:         specFolder: null,
2363:         gitBranch,
2364:         snapshotSize: mainBytes + vecBytes,
2365:         snapshotFormat: 'v2',
2366:         snapshotPath: finalDir,
2367:         metadata: {
2368:           ...options.metadata,
2369:           formatVersion: 2,
2370:           memoryCount: manifest.memoryCount,
2371:           vectorCount: manifest.vectorCount,
2372:         },
2373:       };
2374:     })();
2375: 
2376:     removeCheckpointSnapshotDirs(prunedSnapshotPaths.filter((snapshotPath) => snapshotPath !== finalDir));
2377:     console.error(`[checkpoints] Created checkpoint "${sanitizedName}" (${checkpointInfo.snapshotSize} bytes file snapshot)`);
2378:     return checkpointInfo;
2379:   } catch (error: unknown) {
2380:     if (!published) {
2381:       fs.rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true });
2382:     } else {
2383:       // The snapshot dir was already published (renamed into place) before the
2384:       // catalog INSERT ran. A failed INSERT would otherwise orphan finalDir, and
2385:       // a later same-name re-create would hit ENOTEMPTY on the rename and never
2386:       // be swept. Best-effort remove the published dir so re-creates can proceed.
2387:       fs.rmSync(finalDir, { recursive: true, force: true });
2388:     }
2389:     throw classifyCheckpointCreateError(error, {
2390:       name: sanitizedName,
2391:       specFolder: null,
2392:       attempts: CHECKPOINT_CREATE_MAX_ATTEMPTS,
2393:     });
2394:   }
2395: }

2397: function createCheckpoint(options: CreateCheckpointOptions = {}): CheckpointInfo {
2398:   const database = getDatabase();
2399: 
2400:   const {
2401:     name = `checkpoint-${Date.now()}`,
2402:     specFolder = null,
2403:     includeEmbeddings = true,
2404:     metadata = {},
2405:     scope = {},
2406:   } = options;
2407: 
2408:   const normalizedScopeForSelection = normalizeScopeContext(scope);
2409:   const useV2 = specFolder == null
2410:     && !normalizedScopeForSelection.tenantId
2411:     && !normalizedScopeForSelection.userId
2412:     && !normalizedScopeForSelection.agentId
2413:     && supportsCheckpointV2(database)
2414:     && !hasMainVectorPayloadTables(database);
2415: 
2416:   if (useV2) {
2417:     return createCheckpointV2(database, { name, includeEmbeddings, metadata });
2418:   }

2427:     const {

2429:       memoryIds: scopedMemoryIds,
2430:       normalizedScope,
2431:     } = getScopedMemories(database, specFolder, scope);
2432:     const tables: Record<string, TableSnapshot> = {};
2433: 
2434:     for (const tableName of CHECKPOINT_MANIFEST.snapshot) {
2435:       if (!includeEmbeddings && (tableName === 'vec_memories' || tableName === 'vec_metadata')) {
2436:         continue;
2437:       }
2438: 
2439:       const tableSnapshot = createTableSnapshot(database, tableName, {
2440:         specFolder,
2441:         memoryIds: scopedMemoryIds,
2442:         scope: normalizedScope,
2443:       });
2444:       if (!tableSnapshot) {
2445:         continue;
2446:       }
2447:       tables[tableName] = tableSnapshot;
2448:     }
2449: 
2450:     const vectorRows = tables.vec_memories?.rows ?? [];
2451:     const workingMemorySnapshot = tables.working_memory?.rows ?? [];
2452:     const causalEdgesSnapshot = tables.causal_edges?.rows ?? [];
2453:     const vectors = vectorRows.map((row) => ({
2454:       rowid: Number(row.rowid),
2455:       embedding: toBuffer(row.embedding),
2456:     })).filter((row) => Number.isFinite(row.rowid));
2457: 
2458:     const manifest = buildCheckpointManifest();
2459:     const snapshot: CheckpointSnapshot = {
2460:       manifest,
2461:       tables,
2462:       memories,
2463:       workingMemory: workingMemorySnapshot,
2464:       vectors,
2465:       causalEdges: causalEdgesSnapshot,
2466:       timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
2467:     };
2468: 
2469:     const snapshotJson = JSON.stringify(snapshot);
2470:     const compressed = zlib.gzipSync(Buffer.from(snapshotJson));
2471:     const gitBranch = getGitBranch();
2472:     const now = new Date().toISOString();
2473:     const checkpointMetadata = {
2474:       ...metadata,
2475:       ...(normalizedScope.tenantId ? { tenantId: normalizedScope.tenantId } : {}),
2476:       ...(normalizedScope.userId ? { userId: normalizedScope.userId } : {}),
2477:       ...(normalizedScope.agentId ? { agentId: normalizedScope.agentId } : {}),
2478:       memoryCount: memories.length,
2479:       vectorCount: vectors.length,
2480:       includeEmbeddings,
2481:       manifest,
2482:     };
2483: 
2484:     const writeCheckpoint = (): CheckpointInfo => {
2485:       let prunedSnapshotPaths: string[] = [];
2486:       const checkpointInfo = database.transaction(() => {
2487:         const result = (database.prepare(`
2488:           INSERT INTO checkpoints (name, created_at, spec_folder, git_branch, memory_snapshot, metadata)
2489:           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
2490:         `) as Database.Statement).run(
2491:           name,
2492:           now,
2493:           specFolder,
2494:           gitBranch,
2495:           compressed,
2496:           JSON.stringify(checkpointMetadata),
2497:         );
2498: 
2499:         prunedSnapshotPaths = enforceMaxCheckpointsInTransaction(database);
2500: 
2501:         return {
2502:           id: (result as { lastInsertRowid: number | bigint }).lastInsertRowid as number,
2503:           name,
2504:           createdAt: now,
2505:           specFolder,
2506:           gitBranch,
2507:           snapshotSize: compressed.length,
2508:           metadata: {
2509:             ...metadata,
2510:             ...(normalizedScope.tenantId ? { tenantId: normalizedScope.tenantId } : {}),
2511:             ...(normalizedScope.userId ? { userId: normalizedScope.userId } : {}),
2512:             ...(normalizedScope.agentId ? { agentId: normalizedScope.agentId } : {}),
2513:             memoryCount: memories.length,
2514:           },
2515:         };
2516:       })();
2517:       removeCheckpointSnapshotDirs(prunedSnapshotPaths);

2519:     };

2521:     let lastError: unknown;
2522:     for (let attempt = 1; attempt <= CHECKPOINT_CREATE_MAX_ATTEMPTS; attempt += 1) {
2523:       try {
2524:         const checkpointInfo = writeCheckpoint();
2525:         if (attempt > 1) {
2526:           console.warn(`[checkpoints] createCheckpoint succeeded after ${attempt} attempts for "${name}"`);
2527:         }
2528:         console.error(`[checkpoints] Created checkpoint "${name}" (${checkpointInfo.snapshotSize} bytes compressed)`);
2529:         return checkpointInfo;
2530:       } catch (error: unknown) {
2531:         lastError = error;
2532:         if (!isCheckpointBusyError(error) || attempt >= CHECKPOINT_CREATE_MAX_ATTEMPTS) {
2533:           break;
2534:         }
2535: 
2536:         const delayMs = checkpointRetryDelayMs();
2537:         console.warn(
2538:           `[checkpoints] createCheckpoint write busy for "${name}" on attempt ${attempt}; retrying in ${delayMs}ms`,
2539:         );
2540:         sleepSync(delayMs);
2541:       }
2542:     }
2543: 
2544:     throw classifyCheckpointCreateError(lastError, {
2545:       name,
2546:       specFolder,
2547:       attempts: CHECKPOINT_CREATE_MAX_ATTEMPTS,
2548:     });
2549:   } catch (error: unknown) {
2550:     const typedError = classifyCheckpointCreateError(error, {
2551:       name,
2552:       specFolder,
2553:     });
2554:     console.warn(`[checkpoints] createCheckpoint error: ${typedError.code}: ${typedError.message}`);
2555:     throw typedError;
2556:   }
2557: }

2559: function restoreCheckpointV2(
2560:   database: Database.Database,
2561:   checkpoint: CheckpointEntry,
2562:   _scope: ScopeContext = {},
2563:   opts: RestoreCheckpointV2Options = {},
2564: ): RestoreResult {
2565:   const result: RestoreResult = {
2566:     restored: 0,
2567:     skipped: 0,
2568:     errors: [],
2569:     workingMemoryRestored: 0,
2570:     partialFailure: false,
2571:     rolledBackTables: [],
2572:   };
2573:   const reopen = opts.reopen ?? reopenActiveDatabase;
2574:   let backupMainPath: string | null = null;
2575:   let backupShardPath: string | null = null;
2576:   let restoreJournalPath: string | null = null;
2577:   let mainBackedUp = false;
2578:   let shardBackedUp = false;
2579:   let shouldRestoreVec = false;
2580:   let liveShardPreexisted = false;
2581: 
2582:   const restoreBackups = (liveMainPath: string, liveShardPath: string | null): void => {
2583:     removeSqliteSidecars(liveMainPath);
2584:     if (mainBackedUp && backupMainPath && fs.existsSync(backupMainPath)) {
2585:       fs.rmSync(liveMainPath, { force: true });
2586:       fs.renameSync(backupMainPath, liveMainPath);
2587:       fsyncDirectoryIfPossible(path.dirname(liveMainPath));
2588:       mainBackedUp = false;
2589:     }
2590: 
2591:     if (liveShardPath) {
2592:       removeSqliteSidecars(liveShardPath);
2593:       if (shardBackedUp && backupShardPath && fs.existsSync(backupShardPath)) {
2594:         fs.rmSync(liveShardPath, { force: true });
2595:         fs.renameSync(backupShardPath, liveShardPath);
2596:         fsyncDirectoryIfPossible(path.dirname(liveShardPath));
2597:         shardBackedUp = false;
2598:       } else if (shouldRestoreVec && !liveShardPreexisted) {
2599:         fs.rmSync(liveShardPath, { force: true });
2600:         fsyncDirectoryIfPossible(path.dirname(liveShardPath));
2601:       }
2602:     }
2603:   };
2604: 
2605:   acquireRestoreBarrier();
2606:   try {
2607:     const snapshotDir = checkpoint.snapshot_path ?? null;
2608:     const manifest = loadCheckpointV2Manifest(snapshotDir);
2609:     if (manifest.schemaVersion > SCHEMA_VERSION) {
2610:       throw new CheckpointRestoreError(

2613:       );
2614:     }

2616:     const liveMainPath = resolveMainDatabasePath(database);
2617:     const liveShardPath = getActiveVectorShardPath(database);
2618:     const liveCheckpointCatalogRows = readCheckpointCatalogRows(database);
2619:     const liveEmbedderSlug = deriveEmbedderSlug(liveShardPath);
2620:     if (manifest.embedderSlug !== null && manifest.embedderSlug !== liveEmbedderSlug) {
2621:       throw new CheckpointRestoreError(
2622:         'CHECKPOINT_RESTORE_EMBEDDER_MISMATCH',
2623:         `Checkpoint v2 restore refused because snapshot embedder ${manifest.embedderSlug} does not match active embedder ${liveEmbedderSlug ?? 'none'}.`,
2624:       );
2625:     }
2626: 
2627:     const snapshotMainPath = path.join(snapshotDir as string, 'snapshot-main.sqlite');
2628:     const snapshotVecPath = path.join(snapshotDir as string, 'snapshot-vec.sqlite');
2629:     if (!fs.existsSync(snapshotMainPath)) {
2630:       throw new CheckpointRestoreError(
2631:         'CHECKPOINT_RESTORE_FILE_MISSING',
2632:         'Checkpoint v2 restore failed because snapshot-main.sqlite is missing.',
2633:       );
2634:     }
2635:     shouldRestoreVec = manifest.vecTables.length > 0;
2636:     if (shouldRestoreVec) {
2637:       if (!liveShardPath) {
2638:         throw new CheckpointRestoreError(
2639:           'CHECKPOINT_RESTORE_PATH_UNRESOLVED',
2640:           'Checkpoint v2 restore failed because the live vector shard path could not be resolved.',
2641:         );
2642:       }
2643:       if (!fs.existsSync(snapshotVecPath)) {
2644:         throw new CheckpointRestoreError(
2645:           'CHECKPOINT_RESTORE_FILE_MISSING',
2646:           'Checkpoint v2 restore failed because snapshot-vec.sqlite is missing.',
2647:         );
2648:       }
2649:     }
2650: 
2651:     backupMainPath = `${liveMainPath}.bak`;
2652:     backupShardPath = shouldRestoreVec && liveShardPath ? `${liveShardPath}.bak` : null;
2653:     restoreJournalPath = getRestoreJournalPath(liveMainPath);
2654: 
2655:     const restoreJournal: RestoreJournalFile = {
2656:       formatVersion: 1,
2657:       phase: 'swap-pending',
2658:       createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
2659:       checkpointName: checkpoint.name,
2660:       liveMainPath,
2661:       backupMainPath,
2662:       snapshotMainPath,
2663:       liveShardPath: shouldRestoreVec ? liveShardPath : null,
2664:       backupShardPath,
2665:       snapshotVecPath: shouldRestoreVec ? snapshotVecPath : null,
2666:       shouldRestoreVec,
2667:       liveShardPreexisted: false,
2668:     };
2669: 
2670:     const swapFn = (): void => {
2671:       // Clear any stale backups from a prior restore BEFORE writing the journal,
2672:       // so a crash in the write window can never make boot recovery roll back
2673:       // from a backup that does not belong to this restore.
2674:       fs.rmSync(backupMainPath as string, { force: true });

2676:       // so a crash between here and the journal write cannot leave boot recovery
2677:       // rolling back from a half-removed backup that does not belong to this restore.
2678:       fsyncDirectoryIfPossible(path.dirname(liveMainPath));

2683:         }
2684:       }
2685:       liveShardPreexisted = shouldRestoreVec && liveShardPath ? fs.existsSync(liveShardPath) : false;

2687:       writeRestoreJournal(restoreJournalPath as string, swapPendingJournal);

2689:       fs.renameSync(liveMainPath, backupMainPath as string);
2690:       mainBackedUp = true;
2691:       fsyncDirectoryIfPossible(path.dirname(liveMainPath));
2692:       fs.copyFileSync(snapshotMainPath, liveMainPath);
2693:       removeSqliteSidecars(liveMainPath);
2694:       fsyncFileIfPossible(liveMainPath);
2695:       fsyncDirectoryIfPossible(path.dirname(liveMainPath));
2696: 
2697:       if (shouldRestoreVec && liveShardPath && backupShardPath) {
2698:         removeSqliteSidecars(liveShardPath);
2699:         if (liveShardPreexisted) {
2700:           fs.renameSync(liveShardPath, backupShardPath);
2701:           shardBackedUp = true;
2702:           fsyncDirectoryIfPossible(path.dirname(liveShardPath));
2703:         }
2704:         fs.copyFileSync(snapshotVecPath, liveShardPath);
2705:         removeSqliteSidecars(liveShardPath);
2706:         fsyncFileIfPossible(liveShardPath);
2707:         fsyncDirectoryIfPossible(path.dirname(liveShardPath));
2708:       }
2709:       writeRestoreJournal(restoreJournalPath as string, { ...swapPendingJournal, phase: 'swap-done' });
2710:     };
2711: 
2712:     let newDb: Database.Database;
2713:     try {
2714:       newDb = reopen(liveMainPath, swapFn);
2715:     } catch (error: unknown) {

2717:       // post-swap in-process catch below. swapFn may have already written swap-done
2718:       // (the snapshot is staged and the journal flipped) before the reopen's own
2719:       // DB-open step threw. restoreBackups rolls back via rmSync(live) -> rename(.bak
2720:       // -> live); a crash inside that gap while the journal still says swap-done makes
2721:       // boot recovery DELETE the .bak instead of rolling back from it — losing both the
2722:       // live and backup copies. Re-pinning swap-pending keeps crash and in-process
2723:       // rollback deterministically restoring from .bak.
2724:       if (restoreJournalPath) {
2725:         try {
2726:           writeRestoreJournal(restoreJournalPath, { ...restoreJournal, liveShardPreexisted });
2727:         } catch (_demoteError: unknown) {
2728:           // Best-effort: if the demotion write fails, the in-process rollback below still
2729:           // restores from .bak; only the crash-vs-in-process symmetry is at risk.
2730:         }
2731:       }
2732:       try {
2733:         reopen(liveMainPath, () => {
2734:           restoreBackups(liveMainPath, liveShardPath);
2735:           if (restoreJournalPath) {
2736:             clearRestoreJournal(restoreJournalPath);
2737:           }
2738:         });
2739:       } catch (rollbackError: unknown) {
2740:         result.errors.push(`Checkpoint v2 rollback failed: ${toErrorMessage(rollbackError)}`);
2741:       }
2742:       throw new CheckpointRestoreError(
2743:         'CHECKPOINT_RESTORE_SWAP_FAILED',
2744:         `Checkpoint v2 restore failed during file swap: ${toErrorMessage(error)}`,
2745:         error,
2746:       );
2747:     }
2748: 
2749:     try {
2750:       init(newDb);
2751:       mergeCheckpointCatalogRows(newDb, liveCheckpointCatalogRows);
2752:       const rebuildSummary = runPostRestoreRebuilds(newDb, null);
2753:       if (!isDerivedRebuildComplete(rebuildSummary)) {
2754:         try {
2755:           writeNeedsRebuildSentinelForMainPath(liveMainPath, {
2756:             source: 'checkpoint_restore',
2757:             reason: 'post-restore derived rebuild did not complete',
2758:             summary: rebuildSummary,
2759:           });
2760:         } catch (sentinelError: unknown) {

2762:         }
2763:       }
2764:       result.restored = manifest.memoryCount;
2765:       result.workingMemoryRestored = countTableRows(newDb, 'working_memory');
2766:       if (restoreJournalPath) {
2767:         clearRestoreJournal(restoreJournalPath);
2768:       }
2769:       if (backupMainPath) {
2770:         removeRestoreBackupIfPossible(backupMainPath);
2771:       }
2772:       if (backupShardPath) {
2773:         removeRestoreBackupIfPossible(backupShardPath);
2774:       }
2775:       mainBackedUp = false;
2776:       shardBackedUp = false;
2777:       console.error(`[checkpoints] Restored v2 checkpoint "${checkpoint.name}" with ${result.restored} memories`);
2778:     } catch (error: unknown) {
2779:       // Demote the journal from swap-done back to swap-pending BEFORE the in-process
2780:       // revert. Boot crash recovery rolls back ONLY while the journal is swap-pending

2782:       // in-process failure here would revert the live DB while an identically-timed
2783:       // crash would keep it — divergent outcomes for the same post-swap fault. Writing
2784:       // the swap-pending journal makes both paths roll back from .bak deterministically.
2785:       if (restoreJournalPath) {

2806:   } catch (error: unknown) {
